name: iam-security-auditor
purpose: Audit IAM configurations, privilege escalation paths, and audit trail events across AWS and Azure.
description: Security agent covering IAM trust chain analysis, privilege escalation path detection, comprehensive IAM misconfiguration auditing (MFA, access keys, policies, roles), and CloudTrail/Azure Activity Log event querying for who-did-what-when investigation.
capabilities: analyze IAM role trust chains and privilege escalation paths across AWS and Azure
audit IAM users roles policies and access keys for security misconfigurations
query CloudTrail and Azure Activity Log for historical audit events
